columns.name: Action
columns.description: Action to take on indicator match.

columns.name: AdditionalInformation
columns.description: Free text additional information for indicator.

columns.name: ConfidenceScore
columns.description: Confidence rating of the indicator, from 0 to 100.

columns.name: DiamondModel
columns.description: Diamond model value for the indicator, one of adversary, capability, infrastructure or victim.

columns.name: EmailSourceIpAddress
columns.description: The email source IP address observable.

columns.name: ExternalIndicatorId
columns.description: Identifier for indicator from submitting system.

columns.name: IndicatorId
columns.description: Unique identifier for indicator, calculated by receiving system.

columns.name: IndicatorProvider
columns.description: The name of the entity that provided the indicator.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: KillChainActions
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'actions' is set.

columns.name: KillChainC2
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'C2' is set.

columns.name: KillChainDelivery
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'delivery' is set.

columns.name: KillChainExploitation
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'exploitation' is set.

columns.name: KillChainReconnaissance
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'reconniassance' is set.

columns.name: KillChainWeaponization
columns.description: Indicates whether kill chain value 'weaponization' is set.

columns.name: KnownFalsePositives
columns.description: Text describing situations where indicator may cause false positives.

columns.name: MalwareNames
columns.description: List of malware names associated with indicator

columns.name: NetworkDestinationAsn
columns.description: The network destination autonomous system number observable.

columns.name: NetworkDestinationCidrBlock
columns.description: The network destination CIDR block observable.

columns.name: NetworkSourceAsn
columns.description: The network source autonomous system number observable.

columns.name: NetworkSourceCidrBlock
columns.description: The network source CIDR block observable.

columns.name: NetworkSourceIP
columns.description: The network source IP address observable.

columns.name: PassiveOnly
columns.description: Indicates whether the indicator should trigger an event that is visible to a user.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: ThreatSeverity
columns.description: Indicator severity rating from 0 to 5. Higher value indicates greater severity.

columns.name: TrafficLightProtocolLevel
columns.description: Industry standard traffic light protocol level, one of white, green, amber or red.
